de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.model

Class Model

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.model.Model

  • public class Model
extends Object
    Represents an SMT model.
    Author:
    mihai

    • Field Summary

      Modifier and Type Field and Description

      Maps constant names to constant values.
      private boolean empty

      List of location sets.
      private Map<String,String> reversedConstants
      Maps constant values to constant names.

      List of sequences.

      Type information from the SMT specification.

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addAliases()
      For all values it adds the names of the constants which have the same values.
      void addConstant(String key, String value)
      Adds a constant to the model.
      void addHeap(Heap e)
      Adds a heap to the model.
      void addLocationSet(LocationSet e)
      Adds a location set to the model.
      void addSequence(Sequence s)
      Adds a sequence set to the model.
      private void fillReversedTable()
      Fills the reversed constants table.
      ObjectVal findObject(String ref) 
      private String formatAny(String val, SMTSort s)
      Transforms a binary value of an any to a human readable form: #sn, where s is the first letter of the actual sort name and n is the decimal value of corresponding to the any value after the removal of the three type bits and the fill up bits.

      Map<String,String> getConstants() 
      List<Heap> getHeaps() 
      List<LocationSet> getLocsets()

      List<Sequence> getSequences() 
      ProblemTypeInformation getTypes() 
      boolean isEmpty() 
      Set<ObjectVal> pointsTo(String name, Heap heap) 
      String processAnyValue(String val)
      Transforms a binary value of an any to a human readable form: #sn, where s is the first letter of the actual sort name and n is the decimal value of corresponding to the any value after the removal of the three type bits and the fill up bits.
      void processArrayValues()
      Transforms the values of array fields of objects from binary/hexidecimal to human readable form.
      void processConstantsAndFieldValues()
      Transforms the values of constants and object fields from binary/hexadecimal to a human readable from.
      String processConstantValue(String val, SMTSort s)
      Transforms a constant value from binary/hexadecimal form to a human redable form.
      private void processLocSetNames()
      Rewrites the values of location sets from binary/hexadecimal to a human readable form.
      private String processObjectID(String objectID)
      Transforms an Object id from binary form to #on, where n is a decimal number.
      void processObjectNames()
      Rewrite the object names from binary/hexadecimal to a human readable form.
      private String processSeqID(String sequenceID)
      Transforms a sequence id from binary form to #sn, where n is a decimal number.
      void processSequenceNames()
      Rewrite the sequence names from binary/hexadecimal to a human readable form.
      void processSeqValues()
      Transforms values of sequences from binary/hexadecimal to human readable form

      void removeUnnecessaryObjects() 
      void setEmpty(boolean empty) 
      void setTypes(ProblemTypeInformation types)

        Maps constant names to constant values. (constantName, constantValue)

      • isEmpty

        public boolean isEmpty()

      • setEmpty

        public void setEmpty(boolean empty)

      • processObjectID

        private String processObjectID(String objectID)
        Transforms an Object id from binary form to #on, where n is a decimal number.
        Parameters:
        objectID - object id in binary form
        Returns:
        #on, where n is a decimal number.

      • processSeqID

        private String processSeqID(String sequenceID)
        Transforms a sequence id from binary form to #sn, where n is a decimal number.
        Parameters:
        sequenceID - sequence id in binary form
        Returns:
        #sn, where n is a decimal number.

        Adds a heap to the model.

        public void addLocationSet(LocationSet e)
        Adds a location set to the model.

        e - The location set to be added.

        public void addSequence(Sequence s)
        Adds a sequence set to the model.
        Parameters:
        s - The sequence to be added.

      • formatAny

        private String formatAny(String val,
                         SMTSort s)
        Transforms a binary value of an any to a human readable form: #sn, where s is the first letter of the actual sort name and n is the decimal value of corresponding to the any value after the removal of the three type bits and the fill up bits.
        Parameters:
        val - original any value
        s - actual sort of the any sort
        Returns:
        formatted value

      • processConstantValue

        public String processConstantValue(String val,
                                   SMTSort s)
        Transforms a constant value from binary/hexadecimal form to a human redable form.
        Parameters:
        val - binary/hexadecimal value of constant
        s - sort of constant
        Returns:
        human readable form #sn with s the first letter of the sort of the constant, and n the decimal value of the constant

      • processAnyValue

        public String processAnyValue(String val)
        Transforms a binary value of an any to a human readable form: #sn, where s is the first letter of the actual sort name and n is the decimal value of corresponding to the any value after the removal of the three type bits and the fill up bits.
        Parameters:
        val - the original any value in binary/hexadecimal
        Returns:
        the formatted value

      • processArrayValues

        public void processArrayValues()
        Transforms the values of array fields of objects from binary/hexidecimal to human readable form.
